name: mast-services-finalize
description: Final operational step: set the MAST NSSM services (mast-unit, mast-pwi4, mast-pwshutter, mast-phd2) to MANUAL start and stop them, so a provisioned unit does not auto-start telescope services on boot. Runs last (order 9500, after all validation and the proxy finalize, before reboot detection) so the per-provider verification steps run while the services are still alive and auto-started. NOTE: manual start is a deliberate current-development-stage measure; once the services are battle-tested this provider is expected to be removed/relaxed so they return to automatic start (a future stage, months out).
